title: isolepis cernua var. setiformis
intro: Isolepis cernua var. setiformis is a type of sedges plant, belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Isolepis cernua var. setiformis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
